name: Salty Swamp
description:
You and your friends were scrolling online when you saw an ad for a tour of a swamp on the outskirts of town with a shockingly low ticket price. Whether it had been curious, recklessness, or boredom, you all signed up. Of course, you had no idea what you were in for.

Art by Zonkpunch

I'm a freak, yes, how could you tell?

Tags- Alligator, Furry, Scalie, Fatfur, Musk, Sweaty, Crocodile, Breeding, Mpreg, Stinky, Zonkpunch, Scent Marking, Donut anus, puffy anus
creator: BriocheIsBad
